prompt: Add global API rate limiting to the application. Use a NestJS-compatible throttling library. Configure a default of 100 requests per 60 seconds. Apply it globally so all endpoints are protected.

Add role-based access control to the application. Users should have a role field (user or admin). Create a guard that checks the current user's role against a required role. Register it so endpoints can be decorated with a role requirement.
Add a bookmarking feature so users can save articles for later, separate from the favorite system. Create endpoints to bookmark/unbookmark and list a user's bookmarks.
Extend the tag system with write operations. Currently tags can only be read. Add endpoints to create, update, and delete tags.
Add full-text search to the articles API. Users should be able to search articles by title, description, and body text.
Add a health check endpoint that verifies the application and its database connection are operational.
